modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access Digital Measures due to restriction error.

full_description_text: 
El técnico está tratando de acceder a Digital Measures pero se encuentra con un error. La página dice que está restringida y que no tiene acceso a esta información. Necesita ayuda para saber cómo solicitar acceso a esta herramienta. Es importante que pueda acceder para realizar su trabajo correctamente.
